title: Bergen Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Bergen, with a Z-Score of -3.37. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bergen are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a high Z-Score deviation from the norm. 
 The city is experiencing a relatively high humidity level of 78% and moderate wind speed of 10.4 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 12.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Implement emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
